mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT user_name), 0) FROM sys_logininfor WHERE status = '0' AND login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0' AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0' AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(NOW())
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM sys_logininfor WHERE DATE(login_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(DATEDIFF(NOW(), MIN(create_time)), 0) FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE status = '0'
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT user_name), 0) FROM sys_logininfor WHERE DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') = DATE_FORMAT(#{dateTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H') AND status = '0'

SELECT m.menu_name as name, FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 10 as value FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.menu_type = 'C' AND m.status = '0' AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != '' AND m.parent_id > 0 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 6
SELECT poi_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM route_poi_detail WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY poi_type ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT hotspot_name as name, visit_count as value FROM route_hotspot_zone ORDER BY visit_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT '活跃用户' as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM sys_user u WHERE u.del_flag = '0' AND u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM sys_logininfor WHERE login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) UNION ALL SELECT '新增用户' as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM sys_user u WHERE u.del_flag = '0' AND DATE(u.create_time) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT '总用户数' as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM sys_user u WHERE u.del_flag = '0'
SELECT HOUR(create_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM route_trajectory_info WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ORDER BY hour
